summary: Completed testing of K&N Import Export application migration from Cloudinary to Supabase. Frontend functionality working correctly with hero slideshow and admin authentication. Backend has one critical API issue requiring database schema fix.

critical_bugs.issue: Database schema issue - column 'media_assets.category' does not exist
critical_bugs.impact: Hero images cannot be fetched, slideshow falls back to hardcoded images
critical_bugs.details: The migration file defines the category column but it appears not to have been applied to the actual Supabase database. All other media endpoints work correctly.

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Returns empty array (no items yet)
✅ Working - Returns empty array (no assets yet)
✅ Working - Returns empty array, supports tag filtering
✅ Working - Successfully creates requests with proper reference IDs

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero slideshow component displaying fallback images
Hero slideshow navigation controls work (dots, prev/next buttons, play/pause)
Admin login page displays correctly at /admin with sign in form
Admin signup toggle works - shows/hides confirm password field
API inventory, media, gallery, and requests endpoints working
Request creation successful with proper reference ID generation
action_item_for_main_agent: Critical: Fix database schema issue - apply the migration to add 'category' column to media_assets table in Supabase database. The migration file exists at /app/supabase/migrations/001_init.sql but the 'category' column is missing from the actual database.

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all core functionality working with proper fallbacks)
